title: Deployment and setup documentation for RPi + LoRa HAT border router
description: Write comprehensive docs: hardware list (RPi4/5 + specific HATs like RAK2287, Waveshare, etc.), flashing, initial setup, systemd enable, WireGuard config, Prometheus, monitoring, security best practices, interop testing with nodes. Include diagrams and troubleshooting.
close_reason: Added comprehensive RPi HAT border router docs covering hardware, systemd install, HAT driver notes, security; 3 codereview passes completed with all findings filed and resolved clean
